 PRODUCT USER MANUAL 
 
 
 
IBI_ANALYSISFORECAST_BGC_005_004 
 
Issue:  4.2 
 
 
Contributors : Lluís Castrillo-Acuña, Elodie Gutknecht, Roland Aznar, Marcos G. Sotillo, Sylvain 
Cailleau 
Approval Date : NOV 2024 
 

 Copernicus Marine Product User Manual for 
IBI_ANALYSISFORECAST_BGC_005_004 
Issue : 4.2 
2024/11

Ref : CMEMS-IBI-PUM-005-004 
2 
RECORD TABLE 
Issue Date § Description of Change Author Validated By 
1.0 
 
 
 
18/01/2017 
 
 
All 
 
 
[EIS April 2017: IBI-V3 version]  
Creation of the PUM document. 
First release of the IBI biogeochemical 
analysis and forecast product. 
Operational launch coincident with update 
of the physical product (IBI-V3 version). 
M.G. Sotillo 
T. Dabrowski 
A. Amo 
E. Gutknecht 
 
E. Álvarez 
Fanjul 
 
 
2.0 18/01/2018 All [EIS March 2018: IBI-V4 version]  
New system version.  
Changes on river inputs, permanent burial 
and atmospheric pCO2.  
Operational launch coincident with update 
of the physical product. 
Update of the whole historical catalogue. 
A. Amo 
T. Dabrowski 
E. Gutknecht 
P. Bowyer 
M.G. Sotillo 
E. Álvarez 
Fanjul 
A. Melet 
2.1 17/04/2019 All [EIS July 2019: IBI-V5 version] 
New variables distributed: pH, DIC and 
spCO2 
New dataset for static files. 
A. Amo M.G. Sotillo 
2.2 03/04/2020  [EIS July 2020: IBI-V5 version]  
Forecast horizon extended to +10 days. 
R. Aznar M.G. Sotillo 
3.0 10/09/2020  [EIS December 2020: IBI-V6 version]  
New system version.  
Revised river inputs.  
Permanent burial function of bottom 
friction.  
CI and OBC from new global system.   
Effect of wave -current coupling in forecast 
mode. 
Operational launch coincident with update 
of the physical product.  
Update of the whole historical catalogue. 
NetCDF-4 file format. 
Renaming of product/datasets. 
A. Amo  
E. Gutknecht 
M.G. Sotillo 
4.0 08/08/2022 All [EIS November 2022: IBI-V7 version]  
New system version.  
New variable distributed: zooplankton. 
Operational launch coincident with update 
of the physical product. 
Update of the whole historical catalogue. 
Delivery of IBI BIO best estimate: additional 
hindcast run (coupled to the best and 
definitive IBI PHY analysis). 
A. Amo  
E. Gutknecht 
R. Aznar 
M.G. Sotillo 
4.1 16/06/2023 II.4 [EIS November 2023: IBI-V7version] A. Amo  
E. Gutknecht 
S. Cailleau 
M. G. Sotillo 
 Copernicus Marine Product User Manual for 
IBI_ANALYSISFORECAST_BGC_005_004 
Issue : 4.2 
2024/11 
 
 
© EU Copernicus Marine Service – Public   
Ref : CMEMS-IBI-PUM-005-004 
3 
 
Update to the new NRT GLO PHY/BGC open 
boundary conditions (1/12°).  
 
R. Aznar 
4.2 31/05/2024 All [EIS November 2024: IBI-V8 version]  
New variable distributed: light attenuation. 
Updated product mask.  
 
L. Castrillo 
R. Aznar 
S. Cailleau 
M. G. Sotillo 
 Copernicus Marine Product User Manual for 
IBI_ANALYSISFORECAST_BGC_005_004

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for IBI_ANALYSISFORECAST_BGC_005_004, detailing the product's specifications and updates from its creation to version 8 in November 2024.

product_line.name: IBI Analysis and Forecast Biogeochemistry Product
